obj_shinobeetle_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_4: Heh^1, they don't&realize they can&ACT and SPARE&on the same turn!/%

obj_shinobeetle_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_7: Phew^1, it's just&me^1? Time to think&for yourself!
Could I get&a little help&from my friends?

obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_445_0: \E0* Ah^1, Kris^1. I keep telling you^1, my items will never change^1. Nor^1, will I./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_446_0: \E0* Though^1, I do find it amusing that you return here to check./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_447_0: \E2* I suppose as long as you keep returning here^1, it's worth staying awake a little while longer.../%
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_457_0: \E3* Kris^1. These strange witches and fairies you have recruited are quite the showoffs with their "magic..." making a racket in the town square./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_458_0: \E0* ..^1. of course^1, they've all crumpled when challenged to a little sparring match./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_466_0: \E0* Jackenstein..^1. he often visits my shop to buy Dark Candies./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_467_0_b: \E0* He seems to have a habit of placing them in his head^1, and handing them out to people from his mouth.../
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_468_0_b: \E2* What did he call it^1? Treat or Treat^1? Ha ha ha..^1. next time^1, perhaps I should give him some candy for free./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_469_0: \E0* Not as if there's any point in selling it anymore.../%
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_487_0_b: \E0* You could call this the power of "will"./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_488_0_b: \E1* ..^1. no^1, perhaps "will" isn't right^1. The power they contain is.../
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_490_0: \E3* When a strong attachment is formed..^1. when a dream is gripped tightly..^1. and then broken off^1. These..^1. are the shards that remain./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_491_0: \E0* "Failed dreams"..^1. of course^1, these things are useless to you^1, Kris./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_492_0: \E0* I^1, however^1, am aware of something interesting we can do with them^1. Something very^1, very^1, interesting./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_497_0: \E0* Kris^1, today you will acquire the final Shadow Crystal!/
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_498_0_b: \E2* Did you ever find the Mannequin^1? Perhaps it may still be an effective armor for you..^1. hee hee hee./%
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_510_0: \E1* ..^1. ah^1. I see^1. You failed to receive the Shadow Crystal./
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_511_0_b: \E3* No^1, no^1, don't worry about disappointing me^1. It's only my own fault for putting such a burden on you.../
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_512_0_b: \E0* You three have a very important adventure^1, don't you?/
obj_shop1_slash_Draw_0_gml_513_0_b: \E2* The whims of a scruffy old cat shouldn't be your priority^1. Well then^1, be on your way./%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_183_0: * The sunset... will&it ever be this&beautiful again?
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_186_0: * That's right^1, go outside.&* It's beautiful./%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_209_0: * I've never seen a sunset so breathtaking.../
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_210_0: * Tell me^1, was everything always this beautiful?/
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_215_0: * Where I came from^1, the colors were bleak./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_216_0: * It was like looking at the world through a napkin./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_217_0: * Here^1, the sunset shines from the back of your eyes^1, like the afterglow of a light you stared at too long./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_227_0: * Right^1, of course^1, I'm also human^1. That's why I look and feel like a flower./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_229_0: * I suppose..^1. it depends on the color of the sunset./%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_233_0: * Names^1, names^1, names^1! That's what everyone always thinks about./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_235_0: * ..^1. well^1, it's your body^1, isn't it?/%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_240_0: * Listen^1, have you had ears before^1? Cute and fluffy ears?/
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_244_0: * ..^1. not like you^1, long ears^1. Those seem like a fire hazard./%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_245_0: * ..^1. especially you^1, purpleface^1. How do you even hear?/%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_246_0: * Yes^1, you're nodding^1. Obviously you agree^1. Obviously./%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_258_0: * Asgore..^1. he seems happy^1. You should be happy for him^1, too./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_259_0: * Me^1? I've..^1. never been able to talk to him^1. For..^1. obvious reasons./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_260_0: * I know^1. It's selfish^1, if you say it out loud^1. Everything..^1. has been thanks to him./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_261_0: * Until now^1, I..^1. I couldn't really think about that./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_263_0: * I can think now^1, though^1. I'll do my best to fit in and help^1, too./%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_267_0: * Up until now^1, I don't think I realized what loneliness was./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_268_0: * Now^1, looking at the sunrise^1, I finally noticed it^1. That pang in my heart.../
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_269_0: * ..^1. I'm going to make friends here^1. I know it^1. Lots and lots of friends.../%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_278_0: * I guess..^1. I'll be "graduating" from here soon./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_279_0: * I..^1. I'm not just ready to leave my friends behind yet.../
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_280_0: * But^1, is that something..^1. anyone is ever ready for?/%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_284_0: * If you "seal the Fountain"..^1. I won't stick around./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_285_0: * I'll..^1. need some time to myself^1, I think./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_286_0: * But^1, I'll be meeting you again./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_287_0: * And Ory^1, I'll be making sure Asgore is watering you properly^1, OK!?/%
